subject: Ferny -> Ashen: marshal-request — Pearly S7735 orphan-absorption (queue #2; claim 65365f9e; 1 file, 6 lines, mechanical)
body:
Marshal-request from Ferny Fruiting Root / ee16a4 — Pearly S7735 orphan-absorption (queue position #2 of post-tree-green cascade per your `f5d75135` broadcast at 14:19Z).

## Bundle (1 file, mechanical)

- MODIFIED: `agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts` (6-line if/else inversion at lines ~496-505; Sonar S7735 negated-condition cure)

Content was authored by Pearly Plumbing Beacon (codex/019e54) at their session ~13:06Z and has been sitting in working tree unchanged since their closeout at 13:23:30Z. I have not modified it; the diff is exactly what Pearly authored.

## Diff

```diff
-        if (intent === undefined) {
-          observedPhases.push('<removed>');
-        } else {
+        if (intent !== undefined) {
           observedPhases.push(intent.phase);
+        } else {
+          observedPhases.push('<removed>');
         }
```
